welcome.tagline: A quiet, local-first workspace for code, with a real native terminal and your favourite AI coding CLIs one keystroke away.
welcome.localFirstBody: Projects stay on disk. metacodex only stores workspace metadata.
welcome.realPtyBody: Same shell as Terminal.app, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Antigravity.

projectEmpty.tagline: Nothing open yet. Start a terminal, or hand it to an AI agent.

general.title: General
general.languageHint: The interface language. Applies instantly across the app.
general.projectStorageHint: metacodex never modifies your folders on disk.
general.saveWorkspaceHint: Open tabs and expanded folders restore on relaunch.
general.restoreTerminalsHint: Terminal sessions are never auto-respawned on relaunch, by design.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.modeHint: Light / dark preference. Picking a theme below syncs this automatically.

interface.title: Interface
interface.description: Tweak which surfaces and agents are visible in the workspace.
interface.iconStyleHint: Monochrome follows the theme. Colored paints brand-known files with their canonical color.
interface.densityHint: Flexes spacing globally. Compact for dense data, spacious for breathing room.
interface.launcherVisibilityHint: Choose which agents appear in the + menu. Hidden agents stay installed and can still be launched from a terminal.

editor.title: Editor
editor.fontFamilyHint: Monospace font for the code editor.
editor.stickyScrollHint: Max enclosing scopes pinned at the top while scrolling. 0 turns it off.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.fontFamilyHint: Monospace font for the terminal. Nerd Fonts render TUI icons.
terminal.scrollbackHint: Lines of history kept per terminal. Lowering it fully applies to new terminals.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: How metacodex signals you when an agent finishes a task or asks for input. Tab badges are always on; the toggles below control the louder surfaces.
notifications.osNotificationsHint: Show a system banner when an agent in the background finishes or requests your attention.
notifications.soundHint: Play a short chime alongside the banner.
notifications.notifyWhenFocusedHint: Off: when metacodex is active and the affected tab is selected, only the tab dot lights up — no banner. On: always show the banner.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Click a shortcut to rebind it. Conflicts are flagged before they apply.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.saveDebounceHint: Milliseconds to wait before persisting layout changes.
advanced.searchDebounceHint: Milliseconds to wait after typing before searching.

cli.title: CLI Registry
cli.description: AI coding CLIs available from the + menu.
cli.overridesNote: Custom CLI overrides will land in a future release. For now, edit <0>{{file}}</0> and restart.

about.title: About
about.tagline: A quiet, local-first workspace for code, with a real native terminal and your favourite AI coding CLIs one keystroke away.
about.author: crafted by
about.devNoUpdates: Updates are disabled in dev mode

cli.notInstalledTooltip: Not installed. Click to open install help.

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.noProjectBody: Open a local folder to browse files. Your folders stay on disk, metacodex only stores workspace metadata.

search.title: Search in project
search.openToSearch: Open a project to search inside it.
search.typeToSearch: Type to search file contents in the current project.

projectRail.removeDescription: This only removes the project from your workspace. The folder on disk is not affected.
projectRail.removeBodySuffix: will be removed from the rail.

menu.imageHint: Use the project favicon or another image.

rename.title: Rename project
rename.description: Renames the project inside metacodex. The folder on disk is not affected.
rename.label: Project name

resume.titleProject: Pick up where you left off in {{name}}
resume.titleGlobal: Pick up where you left off
resume.confirmDiscardBody: It will no longer appear in resume lists. The agent's own history (if any) is not touched.

appShell.deleteFileDescription: The file will be deleted from disk. This action cannot be undone.
appShell.deleteFolderDescription: The folder and all of its contents will be deleted from disk. This action cannot be undone.
appShell.closeAgentDescription: The agent session is active. Any in-progress response will be discarded.
appShell.closeTerminalDescription: The session is active. The running process will be stopped and this tab's history lost.
appShell.closeManyDescription_one: {{inventory}} will be stopped. Running processes will be terminated and in-progress responses discarded.
appShell.closeManyDescription_other: {{inventory}} will be stopped. Running processes will be terminated and in-progress responses discarded.

terminal.piNotConfigured: Pi CLI is not configured yet.
terminal.piNotConfiguredBody: Add the install command and executable name in the metacodex CLI registry.
terminal.lookup: metacodex asks your login shell for <0>{{command}}</0> via <1>{{detect}}</1>.

exitBanner.readerError: Terminal I/O failed — output above may be truncated.

editor.binaryBody: This file looks binary. metacodex MVP only edits text files.
editor.externalDeleted: This file was removed on disk.
editor.externalChanged: Modified on disk outside the editor.

sourceControl.title: Source Control
sourceControl.noProject: Open a project to see its changes.

worktrees.title: Worktrees
worktrees.empty: No worktrees yet. Use the + to spin one up for an agent.
worktrees.abandonBody: The worktree directory and its checkout will be removed. Unpushed commits on this branch will be lost.

dialog.title: New worktree for {{cli}}
dialog.description: A worktree is a parallel checkout of this repo. The agent can edit, run tests, and commit on a different branch without disturbing your main checkout.
dialog.branchHint: Created if it doesn't exist yet. Reused if it does.
dialog.baseHint: Where the new branch starts from. HEAD is the current branch.
dialog.branchInvalid: Branch name can only contain letters, numbers, dots, dashes, slashes and underscores.

merge.title: Merge {{branch}}
merge.description: Merge this worktree's branch into the project's current HEAD.

strategy.ffOnlyHint: Safe. Only works if the histories already line up linearly.
strategy.mergeHint: Creates a merge commit, preserving the branch's history.
strategy.squashHint: Collapses every change into a single commit on HEAD.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostic log
diagnostics.empty: No events yet. Toggle with Cmd+Shift+D.
